title: Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026: Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 through the official college website. A total of 1 Counsellor vacancy has been announced under the Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A. in Psychology/clinical psychology with minimum one year of experience as a Counsellor
qualification.details: M.A. in Psychology/clinical psychology along with minimum one year of experience as a Counsellor in a reputed institution, preferably within an educational institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per University of Delhi/UGC norms
salary_details.details: As per University of Delhi/UGC norms

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for Zakir Husain Delhi College Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for Zakir Husain Delhi College Recruitment 2026 is Counsellor.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Counsellor post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is M.A. in Psychology/clinical psychology with a minimum of one year of experience as a Counsellor.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per University of Delhi/UGC norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Zakir Husain Delhi College located?
faq.answer: Zakir Husain Delhi College is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110002.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
